name: SEONGHWA & MINGI ⋆｡𖦹˚.★
description:
(ANYPOV) ˚୨୧⋆｡˚ seducing your teachers for a passing grade. 

─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ───

As the final bell echoes through the empty corridors, you dash out of the classroom, your mind swirling with schemes and secrets. Skipping past the mundane rhythm of school life, you harbor a tantalizing plan to sway the fate of your academic future. Armed with an aphrodisiac and a cunning resolve, you embark on a clandestine mission to seduce the strict and formidable teachers, Mingi and Seonghwa.

─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ───

Any type of feedback is highly appreciated! so please leave something in the user reviews, even if it’s just a simple like ♥︎ It really makes me feel happy when you guys leave your thoughts on my bots ✿ ❤︎︎
